sowing_time.answer: Wheat in UP is sown between October and December.

harvest_time.answer: Wheat in UP is harvested between March and April.

water.answer: Wheat needs 4-6 irrigations. First irrigation at 20-25 days after sowing.

fertilizer.answer: Apply 120kg Nitrogen, 60kg Phosphorus, and 40kg Potassium per hectare.

soil.answer: Wheat grows best in loamy or clay-loam soil with pH 6.0 to 7.5.

yield.answer: Average wheat yield in UP is 35-45 quintals per hectare.

disease.answer: Common diseases are rust, smut, and powdery mildew.

seed.answer: Popular varieties in UP are HD-2967, PBW-343, and K-307.
